title: Igor-C-Assuncao/IA-notetaking
summary: A privacy-first AI meeting assistant that lives as a floating widget on your desktop. Records microphone and system audio natively — Powered by Tauri v2, WhisperX, and LangGraph. Open-source, no bots, no meeting links — then transcribes and summarizes with your LLM of choice, fully local if you want.

title: 1Panel-dev/MaxKB
summary: 🔥 MaxKB is an open-source platform for building enterprise-grade agents.  强大易用的开源企业级智能体平台。

title: HermeticOrmus/ormus-analyst
summary: Multi-model PDF analysis pipeline. Vision + OCR + local LLMs + Claude synthesis. Self-hosted.

title: Adamgdwn/system-coach-maintenance-manager
summary: Local-first system coach for understanding, diagnosing, and safely maintaining Linux desktops.

title: ogiboy/agentic-trader
summary: Agentic Trader is a strict, local-first, multi-agent paper trading system for Ollama-class models.

title: Sungblab/opencairn-monorepo
summary: Self-hostable, multi-LLM knowledge OS for individuals and teams. Gemini/Ollama, knowledge graph, real-time collaboration, AGPLv3 + commercial license.

title: razoring/CometCLI
summary: Comet helps you save tokens! Comet is a TUI application that automatically generates descriptive git commit messages using local language models via Ollama or LMStudio. It analyzes your staged git diffs and provides a clean interface to review, edit, regenerate, and commit your changes instantly.

title: marceld23/StoryTeller
summary: Interactive voice-controlled storyteller for Raspberry Pi (ReSpeaker) or PC: OpenAI STT/LLM/TTS, RAG worlds, substory dramaturgy, moderation, de/en, web admin.

title: yuma-shintani/ollama-model-library
summary: Get Ollama models from the Ollama library website (https://ollama.com/library) in JSON format.

title: mcp-tool-shop-org/backpropagate
summary: Headless LLM fine-tuning in 3 lines — smart defaults, VRAM-aware batch sizing, multi-run SLAO, GGUF export for Ollama.

title: rckbrcls/world-cup-project
summary: SQL-first FIFA World Cup database project with PostgreSQL rules, lifecycle tools, and an operational browsing client.

title: juninmd/tokenix
summary: Local semantic index CLI that reduces LLM token usage 60-90% -- built in Rust, runs 100% offline

title: Hashevolution/James-RAG-Evol
summary: 🔐 Local-first Graph-RAG with ontology, 3-stage security, self-evolution scaffold. 100% Ollama. MIT.

title: dcostenco/prism-coder
